issues.description: Rest action should be optional ("You may rest"). DSL structure doesn't express optionality. Current DSL treats rest as mandatory before KO.
Target should specify 'rested' as a condition. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' with maxPower is insufficient; must filter for rested state only.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may rest this Character: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with 8000 power or less.
